title: Ping Wheel
description: Allows players to temporarily mark locations and entities
body:
## About Modern co-op games often allow players to communicate via "pings" to mark in-game locations. This simple mod provides such pinging mechanism for the fabric and forge mod loaders. Default keybind is "Mouse5" aka "Forward" to ping. Hold "Tab" (Player List) to see player names on pings. The settings can be changed via `/pingwheel config` or [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). Read the [Wiki](https://github.com/LukenSkyne/Minecraft-Ping-Wheel/wiki) for additional information. If you are looking to use the mod on Bukkit servers, you can install our [official Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/ping-wheel-plugin). ## Gallery The following screenshot shows two pings in different distances with according scale.

When Item Icons are enabled in the settings, the respective markers reflect the item texture (or model).

## Dependencies
